selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel thin-state-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the state-abstraction admissibility parent into controller-facing fences for thin admissible state scope, anti-ontology handling, anti-geometry and anti-time handling, fixed formal-output discipline, and fail-closed non-identitarian state relations with explicit bounded extension lanes.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the state-abstraction packet is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the thin state-language fence tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: STATE_STAYS_THIN_AND_ONLY_OVER_COSMOLOGICALLY_ADMISSIBLE_RELATION_INSTANCES
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's core rule that state stays a thin admissible abstraction rather than a self-grounding layer.

candidate_items.name: STATE_CANNOT_IMPORT_ONTOLOGY_TELEOLOGY_PRIMITIVE_IDENTITY_OR_INTERPRETIVE_FRAMING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's strongest anti-metaphysical and anti-interpretive boundary around state vocabulary.

candidate_items.name: STATE_CANNOT_IMPORT_GEOMETRY_TIME_PROBABILITY_CAUSALITY_OR_OPTIMIZATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's broad exclusion block into a controller-facing fence against state-space inflation.

candidate_items.name: STATE_CLAIMS_REQUIRE_FIXED_HEADER_FORMAL_CONTENT_AND_SINGLE_TAG_DISCIPLINE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps state language inside the parent's exact formal contract instead of widening into narration or hidden semantic authority.

candidate_items.name: STATE_RELATIONS_STAY_NON_IDENTITARIAN_FAIL_CLOSED_AND_ONLY_OPEN_BY_EXPLICIT_EXTENSION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's ordered state build and bounded future-opening posture into a usable controller fence.

quarantined_items.name: STATE_LANGUAGE_AS_ONTOLOGY_OR_ENTITY_IDENTITY_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows state vocabulary while denying entity and identity escalation, so that overread must stay quarantined.

quarantined_items.name: STATE_LANGUAGE_AS_DYNAMICS_STATE_SPACE_OR_INTERPRETIVE_STORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it keeps thin state language available while blocking dynamic, geometric, temporal, and narrative inflation.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-sixth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
